review_execution.command: claude -p --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --tools Read,Grep,Glob --permission-mode dontAsk --output-format json

C00.summary: Actual Claude CLI final re-review verified validation_command_matrix_target_file_map binds to RP00.P00.M07.S04, maps all required contracts, validators, test files, Hermes/package files, and M07 evidence roots, enforces forbidden target disjointness and policy booleans, and does not claim production mutation, runtime writes, generated output approval, real-data import, all M07 completion, or RP00 completion.

findings.title: Forbidden-target disjointness fix is correct but uses redundant, substring-based match conditions
findings.details: The prior P3 is resolved: the validator now asserts no mapped target equals, nests under, or contains a forbidden target. The remaining note is a possible future simplification because contains subsumes the exact/nested checks and may be path-segment refined later.
findings.recommendation: Optionally simplify to a single containment or path-segment-aware check in a later hardening subphase. No change required for S04 closeout.

parsed_review.review_notes: Actual claude-opus-4-8 max read-only CLI final re-review completed with PASS_WITH_FINDINGS and no P0/P1/P2 findings. The first P3 was fixed before final re-review. The remaining P3 is a non-blocking optional simplification and is deferred to a later validator-hardening subphase.
